# viettelidc_ovpc_volume_attachment (Resource)

Attach a ViettelIDC Block Storage Volume to a Compute Instance.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "viettelidc_ovpc_volume_attachment" "attach" {
  instance_id = viettelidc_ovpc_instance.vm.id
  volume_id   = viettelidc_ovpc_volume.data.id
  vpc_id      = viettelidc_ovpc_vpc.main.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `instance_id` (String)
- `volume_id` (String)

### Optional

- `vpc_id` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Composite ID: <instance_id>/<volume_id>
